title: Fix accessing non-rand struct member in constraints
body:
Before this change, there is a compile error when compiling the provided test:
```
Vt_randomize_struct_sel___024unit__03a__03aConstrClass__Vclpkg__0.cpp:37:35: error: ‘std::string’ {aka ‘class std::__cxx11::basic_string<char>’} has no member named ‘__PVT__x’
   37 |                                  .__PVT__x) ;
      |
```
This is because `obj` is first visited and formatted before being converted to constant for solver:
```cpp
    __Vtemp_1 = VL_SFORMATF_N_NX("#x%x",0,32,VL_SFORMATF_N_NX("#b%b",0, 1, this->__PVT__obj).__PVT__x) ;
```

This change first makes sure that the variable needs randomization, and converts it to constant if needed.
